HAPPY CUSTOMERS

Discover why our customers love shopping with us! Read through genuine reviews and testimonials
from people who have experienced our products and services firsthand.

Hobby Gems
Best quality fabric

I was struggling with the H1 heading tag sequence for product pages so I contacted support and after a few days of reviewing this, they fixed it. I thought it wouldn't be possible but they did it. 100% recommended.

Jane Smith
Very attractive

Really fast response time from these guys. No mess, no fuss, knowledgeable, polite and quick. 100% for customer service. When I decide it's time for a new look, I'll be looking at this team again.

The Taylors
Simple and elegant

Decided to change to this theme after 3 years with another theme. It offers some great features & customers like the layout more. Customer service was excellent and very fast. We would recommend this theme.

Kevin Cooper
Design is awesome

This is such a great template! Great features and value for money. But the support team is amazing. I had an issue getting colours to sync in drop downs and the team jumped on and ad it fixed almost right away.

Nature Refillery
Value for money

This theme is such a wonderful & different type of design! I accidentally deleted a snippet & needed the coding put back in. I contacted them to fix the issue & was done so quickly! Thankyou

Help & Support

Our dedicated customer support team is here to help you with any questions or issues you may have.

How do I create an account?

You can create an account by clicking the "Sign Up" button on our homepage. Follow the prompts to enter your email address, create a password, and complete your profile information.

How do I place an order on your online store?

To place an order, browse our products, add your desired items to the cart, and proceed to checkout. Follow the on-screen instructions to complete your purchase.

What is your return policy?

We offer a 30-day return policy on most items. If you are not satisfied with your purchase, please contact our customer support team to initiate a return. Items must be returned in their original condition.

Do you offer international shipping?

Yes, we offer international shipping to select countries. Shipping rates and delivery times vary based on the destination. Please refer to our shipping policy for more details.

How do I apply a discount code to my order?

During checkout, enter your discount code in the designated field and click "Apply." The discount will be applied to your order total.
